mapper.select: SELECT repository_id AS repositoryId, company_id AS companyId, project_id AS projectId, repository_manage_id AS repositoryManageId, repository_identifier AS repositoryName, repository_url AS repositoryUrl, repository_main_yn AS mainYn, created_at AS createdAt FROM repository_setting WHERE company_id = #{companyId} AND project_id = #{projectId} ORDER BY repository_main_yn DESC, created_at DESC

SELECT repository_id AS repositoryId, company_id AS companyId, project_id AS projectId, repository_manage_id AS repositoryManageId, repository_identifier AS repositoryName, repository_url AS repositoryUrl, repository_main_yn AS mainYn, created_at AS createdAt FROM repository_setting WHERE company_id = #{companyId} AND project_id = #{projectId} AND repository_id = #{repositoryId}

SELECT repository_id AS repositoryId, company_id AS companyId, project_id AS projectId, repository_manage_id AS repositoryManageId, repository_identifier AS repositoryName, repository_url AS repositoryUrl, repository_main_yn AS mainYn, created_at AS createdAt FROM repository_setting WHERE company_id = #{companyId} AND project_id = #{projectId} AND repository_main_yn = 'Y'

SELECT DISTINCT rp.permission_code FROM members m JOIN member_roles mr ON m.member_id = mr.member_id JOIN role_permissions rp ON mr.role_id = rp.role_id WHERE m.user_code = #{userCode} AND m.project_id = #{projectId}

SELECT commit_id AS commitId, repository_id AS repositoryId, commit_hash AS commitHash, commit_user AS commitUser, commit_message AS commitMessage, TO_CHAR(committed_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS committedAt, task_id AS taskId FROM commit_logs WHERE repository_id = #{repositoryId} AND commit_hash IN
#{commitHash}
mapper.insert: MERGE INTO commit_logs target USING ( SELECT #{commitId} AS commit_id, #{repositoryId} AS repository_id, #{commitHash} AS commit_hash, #{commitUser} AS commit_user, #{commitMessage} AS commit_message, #{committedAt} AS committed_at_text, #{taskId} AS task_id FROM dual ) source ON ( target.repository_id = source.repository_id AND target.commit_hash = source.commit_hash ) WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( commit_id, repository_id, commit_hash, commit_user, commit_message, committed_at, task_id ) VALUES ( source.commit_id, source.repository_id, source.commit_hash, source.commit_user, source.commit_message, CASE WHEN source.committed_at_text IS NULL OR source.committed_at_text = '-' THEN SYSDATE ELSE TO_DATE(source.committed_at_text, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') END, source.task_id )

SELECT repository_manage_setting_seq.NEXTVAL FROM dual
INSERT INTO repository_manage_setting ( repository_manage_id, company_id, commit_auto_yn, commit_text_yn, task_keyword ) VALUES ( #{repositoryManageId}, #{companyId}, #{commitAutoYn}, #{commitTextYn}, #{taskKeyword} )
mapper.select: SELECT repositoryManageId, companyId, commitAutoYn, commitTextYn, taskKeyword FROM ( SELECT repository_manage_id AS repositoryManageId, company_id AS companyId, NVL(commit_auto_yn, 'Y') AS commitAutoYn, NVL(commit_text_yn, 'Y') AS commitTextYn, task_keyword AS taskKeyword FROM repository_manage_setting WHERE company_id = #{companyId} ORDER BY repository_manage_id ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1
mapper.insert:
SELECT repository_manage_setting_seq.NEXTVAL FROM dual
INSERT INTO repository_manage_setting ( repository_manage_id, company_id, commit_auto_yn, commit_text_yn, task_keyword ) VALUES ( #{repositoryManageId}, #{companyId}, #{commitAutoYn}, #{commitTextYn}, #{taskKeyword} )

SELECT 'REPO-' || TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') || '-' || LPAD(TO_CHAR(repository_setting_seq.NEXTVAL), 6, '0') FROM dual
INSERT INTO repository_setting ( repository_id, company_id, project_id, repository_manage_id, repository_identifier, repository_url, repository_main_yn, created_at ) VALUES ( #{repositoryId}, #{companyId}, #{projectId}, #{repositoryManageId}, #{repositoryName}, #{repositoryUrl}, #{mainYn}, SYSDATE )
